---
title: "overlap genes"
author: "Meiyue Wang"
date: "2026-05-12"
output: html_document
---

1.读取 CSV
```{r}
up_NHBE <- read.csv("NHEB_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_up_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)
up_A549_ACE2 <- read.csv("A549-ACE2_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_up_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)
up_Calu3 <- read.csv("Calu3_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_up_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)

down_NHBE <- read.csv("NHEB_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_down_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)
down_A549_ACE2 <- read.csv("A549-ACE2_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_down_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)
down_Calu3 <- read.csv("Calu3_SARS-CoV-2_Mock_down_regulated_genes.csv",row.names = 1)
```

2.提取基因名
```{r}
genes_up_NHBE <- rownames(up_NHBE)
genes_up_A549_ACE2 <- rownames(up_A549_ACE2)
genes_up_Calu3 <- rownames(up_Calu3)

genes_down_NHBE <- rownames(down_NHBE)
genes_down_A549_ACE2 <- rownames(down_A549_ACE2)
genes_down_Calu3 <- rownames(down_Calu3)

```

3.找共同上调和下调基因
```{r}
common_up <- Reduce(intersect, list(
  genes_up_NHBE,
  genes_up_A549_ACE2,
  genes_up_Calu3
))

common_down <- Reduce(intersect, list(
  genes_down_NHBE,
  genes_down_A549_ACE2,
  genes_down_Calu3
))
```

4.查看结果
```{r}
length(common_up)
common_up

length(common_down)
common_down
```

5.结果导出
```{r}
write.csv(data.frame(gene = common_up),
          "common_up_genes.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(data.frame(gene = common_down),
          "common_down_genes.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

6.画图
```{r}
install.packages("UpSetR")
library(UpSetR)
```
```{r}
gene_list <- list(
  NHBE = genes_up_NHBE,
  A549_ACE2 = genes_up_A549_ACE2,
  Calu3 = genes_up_Calu3
)
pdf("upset_up_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 5)
upset(fromList(gene_list), order.by = "freq")


dev.off()
```

```{r}
gene_list <- list(
  NHBE = genes_down_NHBE,
  A549_ACE2 = genes_down_A549_ACE2,
  Calu3 = genes_down_Calu3
)
pdf("upset_down_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 5)
upset(fromList(gene_list), order.by = "freq")


dev.off()
```



```{r}
install.packages("VennDiagram")
library(VennDiagram)
library(grid)
venn.plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(
    NHBE = genes_up_NHBE,
    A549_ACE2 = genes_up_A549_ACE2,
    Calu3 = genes_up_Calu3
  ),
  
  filename = NULL,  # 不直接保存，先画出来
  
  fill = c("#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#009E73"),
  alpha = 0.5,       # 透明度
  
  cex = 1.5,         # 数字大小
  cat.cex = 1.3,     # 标签大小
  
  cat.pos = c(0, 0, 180),  # 标签位置（可微调）
  cat.dist = 0.05               # 标签距离圆的距离
)

grid.draw(venn.plot)
```
```{r}
pdf("venn_up_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
grid.draw(venn.plot)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(VennDiagram)
library(grid)

venn.plot.down <- venn.diagram(
  x = list(
    NHBE = genes_down_NHBE,
    A549_ACE2 = genes_down_A549_ACE2,
    Calu3 = genes_down_Calu3
  ),
  
  filename = NULL,
  
  # 🎨 高对比颜色（和上调一致，便于对比）
  fill = c("#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#009E73"),
  alpha = 0.6,
  
  cex = 1.5,
  cat.cex = 1.3,
  
  # 3组 → 3个位置
  cat.pos = c(0, 0, 180),
  cat.dist = 0.06,
  
  lwd = 2,
  col = "black"
)
pdf("venn_down_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
grid.draw(venn.plot.down)
dev.off()
```
